description: Letter from Faraḥ b. Yosef b. Faraḥ to Abū Saʿd Khalaf b. Sahl Sukkarī. The two also corresponded in T-S 8J27.13 (PGPID 3747), ca. 1056 CE. Faraḥ thanks the addressee for his expressions of condolence upon the death of Yosef, who had died while traveling. In the empty space on verso accounts are written in a different hand, some with Arabic script and Greek/Coptic numerals. (Information from CUDl and Goitein's index card.)
